note: Event overlap should be zero because runs are disjoint.
RF/traditional features exclude run, eventno, current label, and topology labels.
Flagged if shuffled-label RF transfers current labels above weak-chance tolerance.
Flagged if CWoLa score nearly identifies held-out current, which would suggest leakage.
